entity.summary: Centralized crypto exchange whose official site confirms an active trading platform but does not disclose a verifiable legal domicile or operating origin.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0269. HEI reviewed the official exchange, About, User Agreement, Legal and Policy, and contact surfaces but could not verify a legal entity, headquarters, founding jurisdiction, or ecosystem origin. Unknown is an intentional reviewed classification, not a structural missing value.

events.title: Bitbaby recorded as centralized exchange
events.description: Bitbaby is recorded as an active centralized exchange based on its official domain and CoinGecko source row; its legal and operating origin remains explicitly Unknown after official-site review.
events.notes: Upgrade the origin only if a verifiable company, licensing, or headquarters source becomes available.

evidence.title: Bitbaby official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the Bitbaby identity and active exchange interface. Its linked legal and company surfaces did not provide a verifiable origin during the 2026-06-20 review.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitbaby
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0269.
